title: Implement ferrum-random: Generator API, BitGenerators, 30+ distributions, permutations

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Delivered: ferrum-random fully implemented — 3 BitGenerators (Xoshiro256**, PCG64, Philox 4x32-10), Generator API, 34 distributions (24 continuous + 10 discrete/multivariate), permutations/choice, deterministic parallel generation. 110 tests passing, clippy clean.
